name: voltius
desc: A lightning-fast, modern, local-first SSH/SFTP/Serial client. Real-time E2EE sync, Team vaults, live sharing, plugins and more. Open-source Termius alternative…
descFull: A lightning-fast, modern, local-first SSH/SFTP/Serial client. Real-time E2EE sync, Team vaults, live sharing, plugins and more. Open-source Termius alternative for Windows, Linux, macOS & Android. Built with Rust/Tauri.
